name: C2xGetTokenBitString
title: C2xGetTokenBitString
syntax: long C2xGetTokenBitString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long bufferSize, byte buffer[]); // form 1
long C2xGetTokenBitString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long bufferSize, char buffer[]); // form 2
description: This function gets the bit string value of a token.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g. userDefinedPayload

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the token, e.g. bitString

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in bits

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the data is copied

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
